heading: Definitions
label: 4002 Definitions
notes: Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsFor termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, see note set out preceding , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1681 of Title 48

children.text: the term “export trade” means trade or commerce in goods or services produced in the United States which are exported, or in the course of being exported, from the United States to any other country;

the term “services” includes, but is not limited to, accounting, amusement, architectural, automatic data processing, business, communications, construction franchising and licensing, consulting, engineering, financial, insurance, legal, management, repair, tourism, training, and transportation services;

the term “export trade services” includes, but is not limited to, consulting, international market research, advertising, marketing, insurance, product research and design, legal assistance, transportation, including trade documentation and freight forwarding, communication and processing of foreign orders to and for exporters and foreign purchasers, warehousing, foreign exchange, financing, and taking title to goods, when provided in order to facilitate the export of goods or services produced in the United States;

children.label: A
children.text: exporting goods or services produced in the United States; or

children.label: B
children.text: facilitating the exportation of goods or services produced in the United States by unaffiliated persons by providing one or more export trade services;

the term “State” means any of the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands;

the term “United States” means the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands; and

the term “antitrust laws” means the antitrust laws as defined in , to the extent that applies to unfair methods of competition, and any State antitrust or unfair competition law.section 12(a) of this titlesection 45 of this titlesection 45 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce may by regulation further define any term defined in subsection (a), in order to carry out this subchapter.
